libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For 3.1.0, do not import org.codehaus.janino.util.iterator.*; iterator utilities moved to org.codehaus.commons.compiler.util.iterator.* in commons-compiler, which is already a transitive dependency of janino. Prefer public Janino APIs such as ExpressionEvaluator, ScriptEvaluator, ClassBodyEvaluator, SimpleCompiler, and Compiler for coverage.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8855 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.codehaus.janino:janino:3.1.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that exercise runtime code generation may hit Native Image dynamic class loading limitations; existing Janino tests already account for this pattern.
Avoid relying on old internal org.codehaus.janino.util.* packages when updating tests from 3.0.x to 3.1.x.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Janino 3.1.0 has no external service, Docker image, environment variable, or additional Maven dependency requirement beyond its normal transitive dependency on commons-compiler; the observed javac failure is from a stale test import of an internal utility package moved in 3.1.x.
